semantic.role: Barrel module aggregating agent instruction utility exports from two submodules.
responsibilities: Re-export all exported symbols from './agent-instructions.templates.js' to provide template definitions for agent instructions.
Re-export all exported symbols from './agent-instructions.sync.js' to provide synchronization logic for agent instructions.
outOfScope: Does not contain any custom implementation, logic, or configuration.
Does not directly define or export any agent instruction content itself.
invariants: The set of exported symbols must always be the union of the two submodules' public APIs.
No additional exports or imports should be added to preserve its role as a pure aggregator.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a single entry point for all agent instruction utilities, hiding the internal module split.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Aggregate exports from the two submodules as part of the v1.0.0 release; no functional logic changed.

publicSurface.description: Re-exports all symbols from the agent instructions templates module, providing template definitions for agent instruction formatting and generation.
Re-exports all symbols from the agent instructions synchronization module, providing logic to synchronize instruction sets across environments.
